ddls:
CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code associated with the occupation */,
  "title" TEXT /* Full title of the occupation */,
  "short_title" TEXT /* Shortened title of the occupation */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry this occupation belongs to */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location this occupation belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupations_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., High school diploma or equivalent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "minimum_years" INTEGER /* Minimum number of years required to complete this education level */,
  "average_cost" INTEGER /* Average cost of obtaining this education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment data entry */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation this employment data belongs to */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of employment in this occupation */,
  "numb_employed" INTEGER /* Number of people employed in this occupation */,
  "median_ann_wage" INTEGER /* Median annual wage for this occupation */,
  "employed_may2016" INTEGER /* Number of people employed in this occupation in May 2016 */,
  "average_ann_wage" INTEGER /* Average annual wage for this occupation */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of employment in this occupation */,
  "forecasted_growth" REAL /* Forecasted growth rate for the next 5 years */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupation_education" (
  "occupation_education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation-education relationship */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation this relationship belongs to */,
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level this relationship belongs to */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the education level is required for the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupation_education_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupation_education_education_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_level_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wages" (
  "wage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wage entry */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation this wage belongs to */,
  "average_ann_wage" INTEGER /* Average annual wage for this occupation */,
  "median_ann_wage" INTEGER /* Median annual wage for this occupation */,
  "hourly_wage" INTEGER /* Average hourly wage for this occupation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the wage data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wages_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment trend */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation this trend belongs to */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the employment trend */,
  "trend_year" INTEGER /* Year the trend data is for */,
  "forecasted_trend_value" REAL /* Forecasted value of the employment trend for the next 5 years */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the trend data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_trends_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, industry stakeholder) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the access */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the occupation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user making the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the industry belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industries_parent_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupation_industry" (
  "occupation_industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation-industry relationship */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation this relationship belongs to */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry this relationship belongs to */,
  "primary" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the industry is primary for the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupation_industry_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupation_industry_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "parent_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the location belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_parent_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupation_location" (
  "occupation_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation-location relationship */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation this relationship belongs to */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location this relationship belongs to */,
  "primary" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the location is primary for the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupation_location_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupation_location_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)
